features.title: Problems We Solve in Codebases
features.description: We niche by problem, not industry. Teams call us when releases slow down, regressions keep coming back, and shipping feels risky. We fix the bottlenecks so your team can deliver consistently again.

items.title: Backend Refactoring
items.description: We rebuild fragile backend foundations so your product responds faster and feature work stops breaking unexpectedly.

items.title: Query & Performance Optimization
items.description: We remove bottlenecks that make pages slow and teams hesitant. Result: faster screens, happier users, and less firefighting.

items.title: Frontend Architecture Cleanup
items.description: We untangle frontend architecture so your team can ship changes quickly without causing fragile UI regressions.

items.title: Authorization & Security
items.description: We consolidate access rules so permissions are predictable, safer, and easier to maintain as your product grows.

items.title: Focused Internal Tools
items.description: For teams drowning in spreadsheets: we build focused operational tools that replace one broken process at a time. Bounded scope, measurable outcomes.

items.title: Ongoing Codebase Support
items.description: Retainer-based support for teams that need a senior web engineer on call. Architecture reviews, incremental improvements, and someone who knows your codebase inside out.

benefits.title: Why Teams Call Us When Shipping Slows Down
benefits.description: You don't need another agency. You need technical clarity, safer releases, and a codebase your team can move in confidently.

items.title: Stack-Flexible, Not Stack-Locked
items.description: We work in your current stack and improve what already exists, so you get progress without costly rewrites.

items.title: Zero Downtime Changes
items.description: We refactor production codebases with incremental changes, migration paths, and rollback safety. No big-bang rewrites.

items.title: Read Before We Write
items.description: We understand your existing codebase, patterns, and conventions before changing anything. No reckless refactors.

items.title: Predictable Delivery
items.description: Every engagement starts with a codebase review so we scope accurately. Fixed timelines, no surprises.

items.title: Direct Access to Engineers
items.description: You work directly with the engineers doing the work. No account managers, no telephone game, no offshore relay teams.

items.title: Bounded Scope, Always
items.description: We scope tightly and deliver on what's agreed. No feature creep, no surprise invoices, no scope sprawl.

process.title: From Codebase Review to Stable Ship
process.description: Whether you need stabilization or a focused internal tool, we start by understanding what exists before changing anything. No guesswork, no big-bang rewrites.

steps.title: Codebase Review
steps.subtitle: We read your code, identify the top issues, and give you an honest assessment.

steps.title: Refactor Plan
steps.subtitle: A clear, prioritized plan for what to fix first and how to do it safely.

steps.title: Incremental Sprints
steps.subtitle: We execute changes incrementally — no big-bang rewrites, no broken production.

steps.title: Handoff & Retainer
steps.subtitle: Full delivery with documented changes and optional ongoing support.

items.situation: A Series A startup grew quickly, but their backend had become hard to change safely and every release felt risky.
items.problem: Key screens took 3-5 seconds to load, regressions kept recurring, and product velocity dropped each sprint.
items.solution: We rebuilt their backend data patterns and centralized authorization logic — cutting load times from seconds to milliseconds and making releases predictable again.

items.situation: A learning platform needed to scale from hundreds to thousands of users, but performance issues were blocking growth.
items.problem: Submissions slowed down under load, leaderboards timed out, and frontend rendering issues hurt reliability.
items.solution: We redesigned core data access and cleaned up app rendering boundaries — so pages stayed fast, rankings remained stable, and growth no longer risked product quality.

items.situation: A technical services company was scheduling field technicians using shared spreadsheets and group chats, with managers manually tracking job status.
items.problem: Double bookings happened weekly. Technicians showed up without context. Managers had no real-time view of daily operations.
items.solution: We built a focused scheduling tool with real-time status tracking, technician calendars, and a centralized dashboard — scoped to their exact workflow.

leadMagnet.title: Is Your Codebase Holding You Back?
leadMagnet.description: Download our Codebase Health Check — 7 signs your codebase is quietly killing delivery speed.
leadMagnet.successDescription: We've sent the Codebase Health Check to your email.
items: Queries are slow and nobody knows why
Key pages take 3+ seconds to load
Authorization logic is scattered across the codebase
Every new feature introduces unexpected regressions
Your data model has grown organically without clear design
You avoid touching certain files because 'they just work'
Your team is shipping slower than 6 months ago
leadMagnet.ctaHelper: PDF delivered instantly. No spam, ever.

pricing.title: Scope-Based Pricing
pricing.description: We price based on the problem scope and risk — not hours. Every engagement starts with a codebase review so we can isolate root causes before touching production.

Prioritized list of issues with severity ratings

Standalone value — even if you don't proceed

workflowAudit.description: In 30 minutes, we identify what is slowing your team down and what to fix first. No pitch. No pressure. Just a practical path to faster, safer releases.

footer.title: Ready to Stabilize Your Codebase?
footer.description: Start with a free codebase review call. We'll identify the top issues holding your team back and tell you exactly what it would take to fix them.
footer.summary: Web engineers who fix codebases that slow teams down. We stabilize architecture, improve release safety, and build focused internal tools when needed.
